incidents.resolution: Reuse existing modular stages, batch cross-encoder inference, freeze each context arm, and merge only complete 200-row generation artifacts.

incidents.observed: 200 HTTP 200 responses but 200/200 schema validation failures
incidents.root_cause: The prompt referenced the evidence-grounded schema without spelling out its required keys, so the model emitted an incompatible {answer: ...} object.
incidents.resolution: Declare the complete JSON schema in the shared closed-book prompt, pass a one-row probe, then rerun all 200 rows under a new prompt hash.

bias_control: Failed runs are excluded by protocol hash, retained as incidents, and never substituted into scientific metrics. Population size, model, scorer and temperature were unchanged.
